Article: Favorite latest fan terms
[]: Favorite latest fan terms             Quote Post by Sun Stealer » Mon Jul 19, 2010 8:15 pm What is your favorite eva fan term you've heard coined recently. I'll go first: *Huggable Ball of Autism

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Mon Jul 19, 2010 8:24 pm I can’t think of any, but I like the one you posted.

[]:             Quote Post by The Fourth Evangelion » Mon Jul 19, 2010 8:24 pm LAEM's still my fave

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Mon Jul 19, 2010 10:28 pm Hmm. As far as fan terminology goes, I'm rather fond of Crazy Steve, Princess Sugar Fairy, and Oliver Twist, the all-star cast of Anno's hit new film series.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Jul 20, 2010 8:47 am Inner lesbian

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Jul 20, 2010 12:32 pm I miss Mayo.

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Tue Jul 20, 2010 3:23 pm esselfortium wrote: Hmm. As far as fan terminology goes, I'm rather fond of Crazy Steve, Princess Sugar Fairy, and Oliver Twist, the all-star cast of Anno's hit new film series.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Tue Jul 20, 2010 3:53 pm NME, that's something for Anno and cia.: No More Eva. Thanks but no thanks. There is already enough.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Tue Jul 20, 2010 4:09 pm Sharaz Destler wrote: Which one's Crazy Steve?

[]:             Quote Post by NatTheWriter » Tue Jul 20, 2010 9:03 pm A few folks on another forum seem to be fond of "Super Happy Shiny Suicide Song".

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Tue Jul 20, 2010 9:43 pm NERV's "Project Ragequit" (read: Human Instrumentality Project)

 Happy Shiny Suicide Song".
